product.name: Nike Dunk Low Retro
product.description:
From the school-spirited College Colors Program to the vibrant Nike CO.JP collection, Nike Dunks have seen many colorways since the design’s inception in 1985. But with each new colorway, the Dunk’s classic color-blocking has remained in some capacity. Nike put its timeless color-blocking to work with the Nike Dunk Low Retro White Black.
The upper Nike Dunk Low Retro White Black is constructed of white leather with black leather overlays and Swooshes. Classic Nike branding is featured on the nylon tongue, nodding to traditional Dunk design elements. A white midsole and black outsole complete the design.
The Nike Dunk Low Retro White Black released in January of 2021 and retailed for $100.
To shop all Nike Dunks, click here.

product.name: Tobago Stripe Blue Twin/Twin XL Duvet Cover Set - Levtex Home
product.description:
Highlights

LEVTEX TOBAGO STRIPE BLUE : The Tobago Stripe Blue duvet collection is a classic ticking stripe. The set consists of a duvet cove and matching pillow shams.
THE TOBAGO STRIPE BLUE DESIGN: One of our most popular sets, Tobago Stripe Blue is cool and breezy. The front is a classic stripe and the reverse is same pattern. Button closures at the bottom of the duvet cover are durable and easy to use.
SOFT AND COMFORTABLE LUXURY: Made from 100% cotton that will never feel heavy, stiff or uncomfortable, the Tobago Stripe Blue Duvet Cover Set has an ultra soft feel that you’ll simply love. Our duvet cover is very generously sized to give your bedroom a feeling of comfort and luxury. Make sure it is the correct size to fit your duvet inner.
EASY CARE: Pre washed for your convenience, the Selesta Blue quilt is easy to look after. Simply machine wash on a cold, gentle cycle, then line dry or tumble dry at low temperature.

product.name: MSI Yellow Pebbles 12 in. x 12 in. Polished Quartzite Floor and Wall Tile (10 sq. ft. / case) LPEBMYEL1212POL
product.description: M. S. International Yellow Polished Pebbles 12 in. x 12 in. Mesh-mounted Mosaic is a Natural Stone Marble. With a large selection of sizes and accessories to choose from, this tile can easily be laid in a pattern or single layout and is suitable for residential and commercial installations, including kitchens and bathrooms.  NOTE: Inspect all tiles before installation. Natural stone products inherently lack uniformity and are subject to variation in color, shade, finish, etc. It is recommended to blend tiles from different boxes when installing. Natural stones may be characterized by dry seams and pits that are often filled. The filling can work its way out and it may be necessary to refill these voids as part of a normal maintenance procedure. All natural stone products should be sealed with a penetrating sealer. After installation, vendor disclaims any liabilities.

product.name: ABC Warpstreme Jogger
product.description:
Feels like: ready for the weekend.

From sport mode to chill, our ABC joggers are here for whatever downtime means to you.

Features(Click to Close)

The choice is yours

Wear the waistband drawcord facing out or inside for a sleeker look.

Hidden gem

A discreet zippered back pocket keeps small items secure.

Fit(Click to Close)

Unmistakable fit

Tapered cuffs give these joggers their iconic, sporty look.

ABC: Anti-Ball-Crushing

Sit, stand, stretch, or cycle. Our ABC™ technology removes tension from the crotch of our pants to unlock your full range of motion.

Made for movement

Designed with four-way stretch and excellent shape retention so your pants don't bag out.

Fabric(Click to Close)

No iron? No problem

Wrinkle-resistance means these joggers keep you looking put together.

Smooth operator

Warpstreme™ fabric feels smooth—inside and out. It's midweight and great for multiple seasons throughout the year.

Material and care

100% Polyester (recycled)

Body:
53% Elastomultiester,
47% Polyester (recycled)

Rib:
88% Nylon,
12% Lycra Elastane

Do Not Bleach

Do Not Iron
Do Not Dry Clean

product.name: Speedcat Sneakers
product.description: The PUMA Speedcat has been an icon of racing culture and street style for decades. The world first knew it as an ultra-slim driving shoe designed to shave milliseconds off lap times. It then became a sleek streetwear staple seen on the streets of global fashion capitals. Its story is constantly evolving, as it’s adopted by the trendsetters and pace-setters of every generation.

product.name: Colorful Eyeshadow
product.description:
What it is: A collection of vegan, highly pigmented, pressed-powder single eyeshadows available in eye catching matte, shimmer, and glitter finishes.

Ingredient Callouts: Free of parabens, formaldehydes, formaldehyde-releasing agents, phthalates, mineral oil, retinyl palmitate, oxybenzone, coal tar, hydroquinone, sulfates SLS & SLES, triclocarban, triclosan, and contains less than one percent synthetic fragrance. It is also vegan, gluten-free, cruelty-free, and comes in recyclable packaging.

What Else You Need to Know: This collection of stunning single eyeshadows comes in a variety of shades from neutral nude to vibrant matte, shimmer, and glitter finishes. Their silky texture guarantees intense and buildable coverage. They can be applied to the eyelids or used on other areas of the face to achieve a personalized, unique look. The matte and shimmer shades are best used with a brush, and the glitter shades are best used when applied with your fingertips for maximum color payoff.

product.name: Bondi 9
product.description:
Take on your sports and fitness journey with style and confidence wearing Hoka® Bondi 9 Sneakers. The low-top sneakers are crafted with a jacquard knit engineered mesh upper with zonal breathability, cotton lining, textile insole, and a new premium foam midsole that delivers a soft, resilient ride. This ultra-cushioned, round toe sneaker is finished with Durabrasion rubber outsole to combat high wear zones. Plus, the Hoka® branding on the side panel adds an authentic touch and the lace-up closure ensures a secure fit.
Imported.
The ultra-cushioned game-changer: Hoka® Bondi 9 sneakers.Romance: One of the hardest working shoes in the HOKA lineup, the Bondi 9 delivers peak plushness for everyday miles. Overhauled from top to bottom, we've increased the stack height and added a new premium foam midsole to deliver that soft, resilient ride that's become synonymous with the Bondi. Elevated with a 3D molded collar and structured knit upper with zonal breathability, this ultra-cushioned cult favorite has been finished with Durabrasion rubber to combat high wear zones. The upper is engineered with mesh and recycled polyester, reflective upper details, extended heel pull, and 3D molded collar. The super critically foamed EVA midsole features smooth MetaRocker™, rearfoot-focused Active Foot Frame™, and Molded EVA sockliner.
Textile lining and EVA insole.
Lace-up closure.
Low-top design.
Branding on the side.
Round toes.
Durabrasion rubber outsole.
Product measurements were taken using size 8, width D - Medium. Please note that measurements may vary by size.
Measurements:

Heel Height: 2 3⁄4 in
Weight: 1 lb 8 oz

SKU 9984296

product.name: Men's Hiday Casualized Hybrid Oxfords
product.description: The Hiday men's lace-up oxford has a classic silhouette, on a modern sole, with a stitched welt. This hybrid style allows for a business look with a casual feel. Subtle branding details have been added to a fashion element. This shoe also comes in with a built-in memory foam for added comfort.
product.descriptionHtml: The Hiday men's lace-up oxford has a classic silhouette, on a modern sole, with a stitched welt. This hybrid style allows for a business look with a casual feel. Subtle branding details have been added to a fashion element. This shoe also comes in with a built-in memory foam for added comfort.
features: Customers praise immediate comfort with no break-in period and supportive gel insoles providing all-day relief
Reviewers commend the sleek, elegant grey design that works for both casual and formal occasions
Many highlight premium stitching and materials, calling them excellent value and repurchasing multiple pairs
Customers describe them as the most comfortable shoes ever, comparing favorably to sneakers for lightness and support
A few note fit concerns for wider feet or occasional minor condition issues upon arrival

product.name: Cozyla 32" 4K Calendar+ 2 (White)
product.description:
Key Features

4K Touch-to-Wake Touchscreen
Create Custom Dashboards with Widgets
Calendar, Meal Plan, To-Do & More
Built-In Android App Store

Show More

Better than leaving notes on the fridge, the 32" 4K Calendar+ 2 from Cozyla lets you access your family's everyday tasks in one place. The display mounts to your wall and offers a customized Android OS that lets everyone create one or more customizable dashboards, each with resizable and repositionable widgets. Widgets like calendars, to-do lists, weather, meal plans, chores, and more. To keep everyone on the same page, two-way auto-syncing to Apple, Google, and Outlook calendars is supported. Beyond daily productivity, Calendar+ 2 can also manage your smart home and entertain, just like a regular TV. This second-generation model does all of this and now offers touch-to-wake to the touchscreen; it sits more flush on your wall and offers upgraded built-in apps.

More Details
product.descriptionHtml:
Key Features

  • 4K Touch-to-Wake Touchscreen
  • Create Custom Dashboards with Widgets
  • Calendar, Meal Plan, To-Do & More

product.name: Bryce Power Reclining Sofa with Power Headrest
product.description: The beautiful, traditional style is enhanced with modern features and ergonomics with the power reclining loveseat with console and power headrests. Striking nailhead trim and flange-edge stitching detail make a timeless design statement that looks equally at home in a modern farmhouse living room or rustic man cave. Soft, pad-over arms, contoured seats, and extended footrests offer exceptional comfort for two, while zero gravity technology provides a feeling of weightlessness. Useful features such as charging ports, a center storage console, power headrests, and automatic power recline offer added convenience that will make Bryce your favorite spot in the house.
product.descriptionHtml: The beautiful, traditional style is enhanced with modern features and ergonomics with the power reclining loveseat with console and power headrests. Striking nailhead trim and flange-edge stitching detail make a timeless design statement that looks equally at home in a modern farmhouse living room or rustic man cave. Soft, pad-over arms, contoured seats, and extended footrests offer exceptional comfort for two, while zero gravity technology provides a feeling of weightlessness. Useful features such as charging ports, a center storage console, power headrests, and automatic power recline offer added convenience that will make Bryce your favorite spot in the house.

A hidden, extended footrest folds out to provide additional leg support when fully reclined

Customize your comfort with a power control that adjusts the recline and headrest independently
Zero gravity recline puts you in the ideal position that reduces pressure and gives you a feeling of weightlessness
A third button on the power control allows you to fully recline or close up with one touch

product.name: Wrinkle-Resistant Linen Short-Sleeve Cameron Shirt
product.description:
Look sharp and feel comfortable in this lightweight, 100% linen solid short-sleeve shirt designed for easy wear all year long. We gave our bestselling solid Cameron a special treatment that helps it resist wrinkles longer than traditional linen, so it keeps its clean, polished look wear after wear.
A Stay-Put Collar, unbreakable buttons, and single-needle side seams give this shirt a refined feel that holds up. Finished with the perfect untucked length, it's an effortless go-to for warm days and nights out. Pair it with our Stretch Chino Shorts for a breezy, put-together look.
FEATURES
• Spread collar
• Short sleeves
• Chest pocket
• Navy signature sail
• SKU #40878Blu
FABRICS
• 100% Linen
• Imported

product.name: iPhone 16 Plus Battery
product.description:
This iPhone 16 Plus replacement battery is what you need to bring your dead iPhone back to life!

Tested to confirm there are no cycles on the cell and the capacity is 95% or higher.
100% factory tested with a customer return rate of only 1%.
Assembled using high quality chipset from Texas Instruments.
Spot tested by iFixit staff to ensure consistency of quality and capacity.
Battery adhesive is included to improve the quality of your repair.

Battery degradation is an inevitable part of the lifespan of your iPhone 16 Plus. Extend the life of your phone with this new replacement battery. If your iPhone 16 Plus won't turn on, is stuck in a boot loop, has a "service battery" warning, or simply won't hold a charge, this replacement battery may be what you need to fix it.
product.descriptionHtml:
This iPhone 16 Plus replacement battery is what you need to bring your dead iPhone back to life!

product.name: Vitamin D3 Mini Gels -- 125 mcg (5000 IU) - 365 Softgels
product.description:
Vitacost Vitamin D3 Mini Gels Description

New, smaller softgels! This high-potency vitamin D supplement supplies 125 mcg per single "mini" softgel serving. Supports maintenance of healthy bones and teeth, cellular function and proper functioning of the immune and nervous systems.*

Vitacost ® Vitamin D3 is your everyday essential

Mini softgels are the perfect size, providing 125 mcg of the preferred form of vitamin D.

Vitamin D as cholecalciferol, the preferred form
High-potency formula with 125 mcg per mini softgel
Free of gluten, soy, fish and eggs
Easy-to-swallow mini gels
Contains 1-year supply

What are the key benefits of Vitacost ® Vitamin D3 Mini Gels?

Contributes to bone strength as proper levels create optimum conditions for bone formation *
Supports proper functioning of the immune and nervous systems *
Promotes intestinal absorption of calcium *
Supports fetal skeletal development and tooth enamel formation *
Contributes to healthy levels of phosphorous in the body *

About Vitacost ® Brand
The search is over. Vitacost Brand products are focused on helping you create a strong foundation with simple, straightforward formulas that support – and easily fit into – your daily life. Whether it’s key letter vitamins you’re looking for or targeted wellness support, Vitacost Brand offers the quality solution you need at the value price you deserve. We continuously look for ways to improve technology, processes or ingredients, so you feel good about what you’re putting in your body or giving to your family. And it’s all right here, at Vitacost.com.

Directions

As a dietary supplement for adults 18 years of age and over, take 1 softgel daily or as directed by a healthcare professional.

Keep dry and at room temperature (59°- 75° F [15° - 24°C]).

Free Of

Milk, eggs, peanuts, tree nuts, crustacean shellfish, fish, soy, gluten, titanium dioxide.

*These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

product.name: Luna Bag
product.description:
A study in modern ease. This sleeveless dress is cut from crisp technical poplin, featuring delicate drawstring ties at the shoulders and pleated detailing along the bodice for a softly structured fit. A draped, gathered waist defines the silhouette, while the asymmetric handkerchief hemline adds graceful movement. Finished with subtle pintuck accents, it’s an effortless piece designed to carry you through every moment with ease.

70% Cotton, 30% Recycled Polyester
Model is 5'10', Bust: 30', Waist: 23', Hips: 34' and wearing a size 4
Professional dry clean only
product.descriptionHtml:
Inspired by the quiet art of origami, the Luna Bag transforms supple lamb nappa leather into a sculptural silhouette shaped by intentional folds. Both functional and poetic, it lies flat when not in use—making it the perfect travel companion and a modern wardrobe essential. With every curve and crease, Luna balances softness and structure, utility and art.

  • 100% Lamb Leather
  • Height: 18.9"
  • Width: 10.6"
  • Depth: 7.9"
  • Handle Drop: 7.9" Top Handle

product.name: Zapatillas Mostro Ecstasy unisex
product.description: Las Mostro no son un calzado para cualquiera. Desde hace más de dos décadas, las usan quienes desafían la norma y se atreven a ser audaces. Llamadas así por la palabra italiana que significa "monstruo", se inspiraron originalmente en dos tipos de zapatillas deportivas: las de clavos para sprints de 1968 y las de surf de los años 80. Hoy en día, siguen cautivando con su diseño distintivo y suela vanguardista de baja altura, con tacos y púas.

product.name: Cotton Utility Button Detail Barrel Leg Trouser
product.description:
Distinctive barrel leg silhouette for a contemporary shape that balances structure with movement
Utility-inspired design with refined button detail for a sophisticated edge
Front pleats create elegant draping and enhance the relaxed fit
Mid-rise waistband with single button fastening for a clean, streamlined look
Versatile 100cm length perfect for pairing with both flats and heels

These cotton utility trousers redefine smart-casual dressing with their distinctive barrel leg shape and considered button detailing. The relaxed silhouette offers both comfort and refinement, making them an essential addition to your wardrobe. Style with a crisp white shirt tucked in to highlight the elegant waistband, or pair with a fitted knit top for a more casual approach. For daytime meetings, complement with pointed flats and a structured tote. When transitioning to evening, simply add a tailored blazer and statement jewellery for an effortlessly chic ensemble. The versatile design works beautifully across seasons - layer with ankle boots and a fine knit during cooler months or wear with minimal sandals when temperatures rise. These trousers embody the perfect balance of contemporary design and timeless appeal that Karen Millen is renowned for.

• Distinctive barrel leg silhouette for a contemporary shape that balances structure with movement
  • Utility-inspired design with refined button detail for a sophisticated edge
  • Front pleats create elegant draping and enhance the relaxed fit
  • Mid-rise waistband with single button fastening for a clean, streamlined look
  • Versatile 100cm length perfect for pairing with both flats and heels

product.name: Italian Seersucker Sutton Suit
product.description:
The Sutton offers a twist on the traditional suit, with a slim tailored fit. Here, it's crafted from an Italian tonal seersucker.

Sutton Jacket paired with the Sutton Trouser
Jacket features notched lapel,a single welt pocket at the chest, two internal pockets at the chest, and a double vent
Trousers have a flat front, an extended tab closure, a split back waist, and belt loops. There are two slant hand pockets and two back pockets with the back right pocket featuring a button closure.
Jacket Style BL257500, Trouser Style PS217500

product.name: Hormone Healthy Eats: 100 Recipes to Balance Your Hormones, Support Your Cycle, and Feel Your Absolute Best
product.description: Eat in tune with your cycle to reverse uncomfortable symptoms of hormonal imbalance and optimize your health, empowering you to look and feel your best. Your hormone health determines everything from your mood and energy to your weight, confidence and libido, making it the foundation of living a happy, healthy and symptom-free life. Luckily, nutrition is one of the best hormone-balancing tools at your disposal. Certified health coach Lauren Chambers helps women optimize their hormones with recipes that deliver the specific nutrients you need during each phase of your cycle. Here, Chambers outlines the four principles of hormone balance and teaches you to support the ebbs and flows of your cycle with delicious recipes, simple tips, and natural remedies. You’ll understand your body’s cues, preserve energy, replenish lost nutrients, and reduce and reverse symptoms like heavy, painful, irregular periods; mood swings; acne; depression; anxiety; digestive issues; hair loss/thinning; and stubborn weight gain. Whether you’re looking to get your cycle back on track, boost your fertility, or simply connect with your body, this book will support you on your health journey and ultimately help you thrive. 100 simple gluten-free recipes make it easy and fun to nourish your body through every phase: Menstrual: Protein and warming foods are key, so try the Cajun-Spiced Shrimp + Creamy Polenta or Bison Butternut Squash Chili Follicular: Get necessary fiber and probiotics with the Green Goddess Chickpea Smash Toast and Weeknight Chicken Cashew Stir-Fry Ovulatory: Keep surging estrogen levels in check with the Honey Sriracha Turkey Protein Bowls and Charred Cauliflower + Dates and Spiced Tahini Sauce Luteal: Boost your mood and magnesium levels with Cozy Autumn Harvest Bowls and Fudgy Flourless PMS Brownies
product.descriptionHtml: Eat in tune with your cycle to reverse uncomfortable symptoms of hormonal imbalance and optimize your health, empowering you to look and feel your best. Your hormone health determines everything from your mood and energy to your weight, confidence and libido, making it the foundation of living a happy, healthy and symptom-free life. Luckily, nutrition is one of the best hormone-balancing tools at your disposal. Certified health coach Lauren Chambers helps women optimize their hormones with recipes that deliver the specific nutrients you need during each phase of your cycle. Here, Chambers outlines the four principles of hormone balance and teaches you to support the ebbs and flows of your cycle with delicious recipes, simple tips, and natural remedies. You’ll understand your body’s cues, preserve energy, replenish lost nutrients, and reduce and reverse symptoms like heavy, painful, irregular periods; mood swings; acne; depression; anxiety; digestive issues; hair loss/thinning; and stubborn weight gain. Whether you’re looking to get your cycle back on track, boost your fertility, or simply connect with your body, this book will support you on your health journey and ultimately help you thrive. 100 simple gluten-free recipes make it easy and fun to nourish your body through every phase: Menstrual: Protein and warming foods are key, so try the Cajun-Spiced Shrimp + Creamy Polenta or Bison Butternut Squash Chili Follicular: Get necessary fiber and probiotics with the Green Goddess Chickpea Smash Toast and Weeknight Chicken Cashew Stir-Fry Ovulatory: Keep surging estrogen levels in check with the Honey Sriracha Turkey Protein Bowls and Charred Cauliflower + Dates and Spiced Tahini Sauce Luteal: Boost your mood and magnesium levels with Cozy Autumn Harvest Bowls and Fudgy Flourless PMS Brownies
